1: Attacks against the demon are made with disadvantage
10: Attacks against the imp are made with disadvantage
11: Ability 1: Moves to the door and opens the room
13: Ability 1: Move -1, Attack -1 as an area attack #30
17: V = number of scouts on the map
18: Ability 1: Heals 2 to itself and all allies
19: Ability 2: All allies gain +1 to all attacks for the entire round. Attacks +1.
20: Ability 1: Summons Living Bones, attacks -1 all adjacent enemies
21: Ability 2: Summons a Living Corpse, moves -1, attacks +2
22: Ability 1: The altar moves, summons a demon, move +2, attack -1
23: Ability 2: The altar moves, summons a demon, move +2, attack -1
26: Ability 1: Attacks -1 all adjacent enemies, Attacks +0 range 3, Eggs hatch
27: Ability 2: Summons a clutch of eggs, moves -1, attacks +0
28: Ability 1: Summons a Deep Terror, attacks -3 #32
29: Ability 2: Summons a Deep Terror, attacks -2 #33
31: Ability 2: Move +0, Summons an imp, Attack -1
32: X = number of hexes moved before the attack
35: Ability 1: Summons a Giant Viper and inflicts terror
37: Ability 1: Spends #20 and summons a Night Demon, applies #24 to itself
38: Ability 2: Spends #19, summons a Sun Demon, heals itself 4, Shield 1
39: All allies on adjacent hexes add +1 to all attacks
40: All allies on adjacent hexes add +2 to all attacks
42: All attacks against the Aesther Ashblade are made with disadvantage
44: Shraka doubles the values of all heal actions and, whenever possible, targets the Steel Lion with heal actions
45: If Shraka applies effect #26 or #34, it applies that same effect a second time
46: Shield applies to itself and all allies
47: If an ally of the Steel Lion on an adjacent hex becomes the target of an attack, the Steel Lion becomes the target of that attack instead.
48: In cases of equal HP, the Steel Lion does not take damage of 6 or more
49: All creatures summoned by Uyrat are elite when 3 or 4 players are playing
50: When a Flame Demon or Earth Demon is on the board, Uyrat may use #22 and #23 as if they had maximum charge.
